reasoning: Koren, today we're addressing your primary limiter: poor lactate clearance. Last ride was an easy session, so today we'll gently ramp up with a focus on over-unders to help bridge the gap between your 5-min and 20-min power. This directly aligns with the demands of the Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5x 5-minute over-unders: 3 mins at 209-218W (low), followed by 2 mins at 242-256W (high), with 5-min recovery at 175W in between

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
